reason: Verify Loading States contract compliance: no /api/v1 or fetch-internals in loading UI; .viewer-art media area reserved (not text-only panel); role=status + aria-label for AT with aria-hidden decorative parts; local scoped CSS using --space/--radius/--ease-standard tokens; prefers-reduced-motion disables shimmer+float. Also Responsive Layout Contract (desktop/tablet/mobile) and Styling Patterns (no one-off colors, scoped not global).

Verify type-import rule (import type for ImageDetailResponse/ImageItem), responsive layout rule, and that scope stays within frontend/vue-gallery /api/v1 boundary with no backend or route-shape changes.
